# Brandt-Daroff — VPPB Home Treatment App

A frontend-only Progressive Web App (PWA) that guides patients through Brandt-Daroff exercises for BPPV (benign paroxysmal positional vertigo) at home.

## What it does
- Step-by-step timer for each exercise position (sitting, lying right, rest, lying left, long rest)
- Visual circular progress ring and countdown per position
- Full treatment tracking with a daily calendar grid and completion status
- Configurable durations, cycles per session, sessions per day, and total treatment days
- Two operation modes: full treatment progress tracking and a quick timer mode without tracking
- Clinical safety warnings and an emergency stop during exercise cycles
- Sound and vibration cues for position changes

## Architecture
- React 18 + Vite + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Zustand + localStorage for state and offline persistence
- react-i18next for multi-language support (English, Catalan, Spanish)
- PWA via vite-plugin-pwa with offline service worker
- No backend; all data stays on the device

## Project conventions
- Mobile-first, high contrast, large tap targets
- No personal/medical data leaves the device
- Medical protocol defaults are respected; user can override durations
- Code, comments, and UI strings are in English / Catalan / Spanish via i18n
- Build commands: npm run dev | build | preview | lint | typecheck
